name: GitHub Models
description: Registers GitHub Models as a first-party chat-completions provider with upstream catalog discovery.

env.description: Fallback GitHub Models token used for catalog discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Secondary fallback GitHub token used when GITHUB_MODELS_TOKEN and api_key are not configured.

settings.label: GitHub Models token
settings.description: GitHub token with Models access used for catalog discovery and inference. Falls back to GITHUB_MODELS_TOKEN, then GITHUB_TOKEN.

providers.name: GitHub Models
providers.description: Refreshes GitHub Models chat-capable models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
